title: Platform
description: Cross-platform library mod based on Architectury to access both Forge and Fabric APIs
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/648382392230215702?color=208fc6&label=%20&labelColor=1b74b6&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/fTzK9SP) [![](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=ItsBlackGear&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=DDE4EF)](https://twitter.com/ItsBlackGear) [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?label=&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon&logoColor=white&url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api/?username=blackgear&type=patrons)](https://patreon.com/blackgear)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
###

¿ Fabric / Quilt ?

You'll need Fabric API

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires_Fabric_API-white?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1b74b6&color=208fc6)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
🚀 **Platform** is a cross-platform library mod based on Architectury to access both Forge and Fabric APIs. **Features:** - Mod Instance Builder. - Built-in Registry Builder. - Biome Modification & Placement Registries. - Simple Vanilla Integration Utilities. - Creative Tab Creation and Modification. - Many Utility classes! - Registries - Particles - Wood Types - Villager Trades - Networking - Configurations - Events - More coming soon! **Supported Mods:** - [Offlimits](https://modrinth.com/mod/offlimits) - [CaveBiomeAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/cavebiomeapi)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
[![](https://i.imgur.com/H8ftf1K.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/minecraft-servers)
